name: claude
notes: Composer is a ProseMirror contenteditable, not a textarea. Send button label flips between 'Send Message' and 'Send message' across A/B tests so both spellings are listed. Response container is keyed on data-test-render-count which Claude uses to dedupe streaming chunks; .font-claude-message scopes inside that to the assistant's own bubble (filtering out the human bubble that shares the parent).
